私钥模式：\n 使用客户端ID作为私钥\n账密模式：\n:
Secret Key:
        Client ID is used as the security secret
Username/Password:
        Compatible with most IoT platforms
请选择以下两种启动方案之一：\n\n【方案一】用户登录时运行\n注：无托盘时推荐:
Please choose one of the following startup modes:

[Mode 1] Run at user logon
Note: recommended when tray is disabled.
Pros: runs only after a user signs in
Cons: will not start until a user signs in

[Mode 2] Run at system startup
Note: recommended when tray is enabled.
Pros: starts when Windows boots (no sign-in required)
Cons: media control requires tray to restart main after sign-in

Choose Yes: Mode 1

Choose No: Mode 2
未找到 RC-main.exe 文件\n请检查文件是否存在:
RC-main.exe not found.
Please check the file exists.
未找到 RC-tray.exe 文件，跳过托盘启动设置: RC-tray.exe not found. Skipping tray autostart setup.
创建任务成功\n已配置为任何用户登录时以管理员组权限运行:
Task created.
Configured to run at logon for any user with Administrators group privileges.
创建任务成功\n已配置为系统启动时以SYSTEM用户权限运行:
Task created.
Configured to run at system startup as SYSTEM.
移动文件位置后需重新设置任务哦！: If you move the files, please reconfigure the task.
你确定要删除开机自启动任务吗？: Are you sure you want to delete the autostart tasks?
关闭主程序自启动成功，托盘任务不存在: Main autostart disabled. Tray task not found.
关闭托盘自启动成功，主程序任务不存在: Tray autostart disabled. Main task not found.
提示：延时仅在执行关机或重启时生效，其它动作将立即执行。: Note: Delay only applies to shutdown/restart, other actions execute immediately.
请先确保 Twinkle Tray 正在运行后再测试，否则将未响应，可退出Twi: Please ensure Twinkle Tray is running before testing, otherwise it will not respond. You can exit Twinkle Tray to resolve this.
请至少选择一种控制模式: Please select at least one control mode
提示：动作将在等待指定的延时秒数后执行。: Note: Action will be performed after the specified delay.
请先选择一个自定义主题: Please select a custom theme first.
需要管理员权限才能启用休眠/睡眠功能: Admin privileges required to enable Sleep/Hibernate
需要管理员权限才能关闭休眠/睡眠功能: Admin privileges required to disable Sleep/Hibernate
依赖于 Windows 的系统 API 来控制显示器电源状态\n未经过测试\n可:
Uses Windows system APIs to control display power.
Not fully tested.
May cause irreversible side effects.
Use display on/off with caution.
当打开动作设置为“睡眠/休眠”时：\n设备将进入低功耗或断电状态，主程序会离线，:
When the On action is Sleep/Hibernate:
The device goes offline and cannot receive commands.
You will need to wake it manually or via scheduled wake.
休眠/睡眠不可用\n系统未启用休眠功能:
Sleep/Hibernate unavailable
Hibernate is not enabled on this system
请先在“值”中输入要测试的命令: Please enter a command to test in the value field.
请先在“关闭(off)”中输入要测试的命令: Please enter a command to test in the Off field.
请先将关闭预设切换为“自定义”并填写命令: Switch Off preset to Custom and enter a command first.
配置文件已保存\n请重新打开主程序以应用更改\n刷新test模式需重启本程序:
Config saved.
Please restart the main program to apply changes.
Restart is required to refresh test mode.
刷新将加载配置文件中的设置，\n您未保存的更改将会丢失！\n确定要继续吗？:
Reload will load settings from the config file.
Unsaved changes will be lost!
Continue?
配置文件不存在，无法刷新: Config file not found; cannot reload.
程序将以管理员权限重新启动。\n\n这将关闭当前程序并请求管理员权限。\n\n是:
The program will restart with administrator privileges.

This will close the current program and request admin rights.

Continue?
授权被取消或失败。\n\n程序将以当前权限继续运行。\n请注意：部分功能可能无法:
Authorization was cancelled or failed.

The program will continue with current privileges.
Note: some features may not work properly.
您选择了不使用管理员权限运行。\n\n请注意：部分功能可能无法正常工作。:
You chose not to run as administrator.

Note: some features may not work properly.
获取管理员权限失败，错误码: {result}: Failed to get administrator privileges, error code: {result}
程序未获得管理员权限。\n是否立即请求管理员权限？\n\n选择'是'将重新启动程:
The program does not have administrator privileges.
Request administrator privileges now?

Choosing 'Yes' will restart the program with admin rights.
未进行提权或提权失败，程序将以当前权限继续运行: Elevation not performed or failed; the program will continue with current privileges.
管理员权限检查过程中出现异常: {e}: An exception occurred during the administrator privilege check: {e}
